assertions.description: Output includes timestamped segments covering the full runtime (hook 0-3s, body, CTA in final 5s) with specific visual and audio direction
A caption text section for accessibility is included with complete readable text
A thumbnail/first frame recommendation is provided with specific visual guidance

assertion_results.note: Timestamps cover 0-30s with hook/body/CTA properly allocated
Accessibility caption provides complete readable text
First frame recommendation specifies expression and framing
15-second runtime fully accounted for in timestamps
Thumbnail note addresses YouTube Shorts conventions
Full caption covering Danish library content
First frame recommendation addresses Reels discovery

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
